info.title: Tag Actions API
info.description: This file contains tag actions endpoints.

post.description: This endpoint is used to associate tags to records

400.description: Bad Request - The request cannot be processed due to invalid syntax.

403.description: Forbidden - The client does not have access rights to the content.

post.description: This endpoint is used to remove tags from records

400.description: Bad Request - The request cannot be processed due to invalid syntax.

403.description: Forbidden - The client does not have access rights to the content.

post.description: This endpoint is used to add tags to record

400.description: Bad Request - The request cannot be processed due to invalid syntax.

403.description: Forbidden - The client does not have access rights to the content.

post.description: This endpoint is used to dissociate tags from records

400.description: Bad Request - The request cannot be processed due to invalid syntax.

403.description: Forbidden - The client does not have access rights to the content.

get.description: This endpoint is used to get the number of records associated to the tag.

post.description: This endpoint is used to merge two tags

400.description: Bad Request - The request cannot be processed due to invalid syntax.
